tagline: When Disaster Hits Medford, We Hit Back Harder
hero_subtitle: 24/7 emergency water, fire, and mold restoration serving Medford and Greater Boston. Fast response, certified technicians, and direct insurance billing so you can focus on your family — not the paperwork.
service_area_description: Serving Medford, Somerville, Malden, Everett, Arlington, Winchester, Stoneham, and communities across Greater Boston.
seo_title: Commonwealth Restoration Team | Water & Fire Restoration in Medford, MA
seo_description: Commonwealth Restoration Team in Medford, MA. 24/7 emergency water damage, fire damage, and mold restoration. Fast response, certified technicians, direct insurance coordination.
services_subtitle: Water damage, fire damage, mold remediation, and storm damage — certified professionals responding 24/7 across Greater Boston.
reviews_subtitle: Fast response, honest pricing, and restoration done right — every time.
cta_heading: Flooded basement? Kitchen fire? Call now.
cta_subtitle: 24/7 emergency response across Greater Boston. We'll be on-site fast and handle your insurance claim start to finish.
footer_description: Commonwealth Restoration Team — 24/7 emergency water, fire, and mold restoration in Medford, MA and Greater Boston. Fast response. Certified technicians. Direct insurance billing.

services_featured.name: Water Damage Restoration
services_featured.description: Emergency water extraction, structural drying, and complete restoration. We respond fast to stop damage from spreading and work directly with your insurance company.

services_secondary.name: Fire & Smoke Restoration
services_secondary.description: Full fire damage cleanup including soot removal, smoke odor elimination, content cleaning, and structural reconstruction to pre-loss condition.

services_accent.name: 24/7 Emergency Response
services_accent.description: Disaster doesn't wait for business hours. Our crews are standing by around the clock — call now for immediate dispatch to your Medford-area property.

services_wide.name: Mold Remediation
services_wide.description: Certified mold inspection, containment, and removal. We identify the moisture source, eliminate the mold, and restore healthy indoor air quality.

about_features.title: Rapid Response, Any Hour
about_features.description: When you call, we move. Our crews are dispatched immediately — day or night — to minimize damage and start restoration fast.

about_features.title: IICRC Certified Technicians
about_features.description: Our team holds certifications in water damage restoration, fire restoration, applied structural drying, and mold remediation.

about_features.title: Direct Insurance Billing
about_features.description: We work directly with all major insurance carriers to handle your claim from start to finish. Less stress, faster resolution.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Pipe burst in our ceiling on a Sunday night. Commonwealth had a crew here within the hour. They extracted the water, dried everything out, and rebuilt our ceiling in under a week. Incredible response.

reviews.name: David R.
reviews.text: Kitchen fire damage was devastating. These guys handled everything — smoke cleanup, odor removal, full rebuild. They even dealt with our insurance company directly. Can't thank them enough.

reviews.name: Jennifer L.
reviews.text: Found mold in our basement after a long winter. Commonwealth tested it, contained the area, and had it completely remediated in four days. Professional and thorough.
